title: The Businesses Pittsburgh Defends in the Comments
subtitle: The places whose regulars show up swinging when somebody leaves a bad review. The defense is the story.
angle: businesses whose customers argue back, ranked by how hard the city shows up for them when criticism lands.
intro: This list is reported, not generated. We are reading the comment sections now, and we only publish a defense we can point to. Subscribe to the index and you will see it the moment it holds up.
